zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke於1501年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas59歲，母親Margaret Cradock23歲。他於1538年2月與Anne Parr在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年3月17日在英國越可爾里士滿 白 雪菲爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke于1501年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas59岁，母亲Margaret Cradock23岁。他于1538年2月与Anne Parr在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年3月17日在英国越可爾里士滿 白 雪菲爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke was born in 1501, in Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, was 59 and his mother, Margaret Cradock, was 23. He married Anne Parr in February 1538, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 March 1570, in Richmond by Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

fr.Swansea, Glamorgan, , Wales: Swansea, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke est né en 1501, à Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cradock, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Parr en février 1538, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1570, à Richmond by Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke 1501 in Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas 59 und seine Mutter Margaret Cradock 23. Er hat im Februar 1538 in London, England Anne Parr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. März 1570 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Richmond by Sheffield, Yorkshire, England und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke è nato il nel 1501 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cradock, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Parr nel febbraio 1538, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 marzo 1570, nel Richmond by Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembrokeが1501年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyasは59歳，母Margaret Cradockは23歳であった。1538年2月にイギリスロンドンでAnne Parrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年3月17日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンド ビー シェフィールドで69歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke(이)가 1501년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cradock(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1538년 2월 영국 런던에서 Anne Parr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 3월 17일 영국 요르크실르 리ch몽 비 셰필드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke nasceu em 1501, em Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cradock, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Parr em fevereiro de 1538, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1570, em Richmond by Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke родился в 1501 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cradock, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Parr февраль 1538 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 марта 1570 г. в местности ричмонд би шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke nació en 1501, en Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Margaret Cradock, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Parr en febrero de 1538, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1570, en Richmond by Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.
